page.content: In the 3rd Quarter of 2023, Comcast NBCUniversal reported significant engagement across various event types in the Asia-Pacific region, as detailed in the Live event attendance and revenue table. The Concerts event type attracted an impressive attendance figure of 150,000, generating a revenue of $75,000,000, with an average ticket price set at $500. In addition, the SportsEvents category recorded a robust attendance of 200,000, leading to a total revenue of $120,000,000, with an average ticket price of $600. The TheaterShows segment saw an attendance of 80,000, which translated into a revenue of $40,000,000, also with an average ticket price of $500.

Pacific region, as detailed in the Live event attendance and revenue table. The Concerts event type attracted an impressive
attendance figure of 150,000, generating a revenue of $75,000,000, with an average ticket price set at $500. In addition, the
SportsEvents category recorded a robust attendance of 200,000, leading to a total revenue of $120,000,000, with an average
ticket price of $600. The TheaterShows segment saw an attendance of 80,000, which translated into a revenue of $40,000,000,

page.content: Moreover, the Festivals attracted the highest attendance of 300,000, resulting in a revenue of $150,000,000, with an average ticket price of $1,200. Cumulatively, these event types contributed to a TotalAttendance of 730,000 and an overall revenue of $385,000,000, with the AverageEventCount reflecting the diverse engagement across these popular event categories. The diverse offerings not only highlight the strong appeal of live events in the region but also underscore Comcast NBCUniversal's strategic focus on maximizing both attendance and revenue through a variety of entertainment options tailored to the preferences of the Asia-Pacific audience.
